de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Interface Strategy

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Feature, Named
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractBlastingMacro.SemanticsBlastingStrategy, AbstractFeatureStrategy, AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro.PropExpansionStrategy, AutoPilotPrepareProofMacro.AutoPilotStrategy, FIFOStrategy, FilterStrategy, FinishSymbolicExecutionMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy, FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilJoinPointMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy, FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy, JavaCardDLStrategy, OneStepProofMacro.OneStepStrategy, PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro.RemovePostStrategy, SelfcompositionStateExpansionMacro.SelfCompExpansionStrategy, SimpleFilteredStrategy, SimplifyTermStrategy, SymbolicExecutionStrategy, TestGenMacro.TestGenStrategy, UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy, WellDefinednessMacro.WellDefinednessStrategy

    public interface Strategy
extends Named, Feature
    Generic interface for evaluating the cost of a RuleApp with regard to a specific strategy

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void instantiateApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, RuleAppCostCollector collector)
      Instantiate an incomplete RuleApp.
      boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Re-Evaluate a RuleApp.

      Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non closeable Goal.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.Feature

        computeCost

    • Method Detail

      • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

        boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
        Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non closeable Goal.
        Returns:
        true stop, false continue on other Goals.

      • isApprovedApp

        boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app,
                    PosInOccurrence pio,
                    Goal goal)
        Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
        Returns:
        true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

      • instantiateApp

        void instantiateApp(RuleApp app,
                  PosInOccurrence pio,
                  Goal goal,
                  RuleAppCostCollector collector)
        Instantiate an incomplete RuleApp. This method is called when the AutomatedRuleApplicationManager comes across a rule application in which some schema variables are not yet instantiated, or which is in some other way incomplete. The strategy then has the opportunity to return/provide a list of (more) complete rule applications by feeding them into the provided RuleAppCostCollector.
